first_run.rationale: The score is identical (2/10), and the core reasoning for the low score remains unchanged across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the critical lack of mandatory C++ experience and specific financial domain knowledge. The minor variations in phrasing for strengths and concerns are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not indicate any substantive change in the assessment of the candidate's skills.
